data.text: make me a website where teachers can post there classes and students can book them

Built a static frontend in [index.html](/home/navid/java/app-builder/agent-backend/workspaces/make-me-a-website-where-teachers-da98/index.html), [app.js](/home/navid/java/app-builder/agent-backend/workspaces/make-me-a-website-where-teachers-da98/app.js), and [styles.css](/home/navid/java/app-builder/agent-backend/workspaces/make-me-a-website-where-teachers-da98/styles.css) for a teacher/student class marketplace. It wires auth via `/auth/*`, teacher class publishing via `/posts`, class discovery via `/bff/feed`, search via `/post-search?q=...`, and booking views/actions via `/bookings/resources`, `/bookings/mine`, `POST /bookings`, and `DELETE /bookings/{id}`.

`./verify-backend.sh` did not complete successfully. The frontend contract lint passed, but the verifier failed immediately on the CORS preflight step because this environment cannot open the socket to `http://localhost:18000`: `curl: (7) failed to open socket: Operation not permitted`.
